title: Holo Moonshine — κ-native WebGPU ASR ear
description: Moonshine ASR (usefulsensors/moonshine) compiled into the κ substrate: safetensors → per-tensor κ-objects → .holo (HTTP-Range, per-block SHA-256 L5 verify, OPFS, offline) → tiled/RoPE/SwiGLU WebGPU forward → SPM detok. Raw-audio (no mel), no 30s padding. Tier-A CPU oracle is exact to HF transformers; Tier-B GPU is greedy-token-identical.
